title: BoundaryCurve
description: BoundaryCurve: Closed, planar, non-self intersecting curve built up of multiple curve segments.

_v.description: A collection of curves, of any or mixed type, which together define a closed, planar, non-self intersection boundary loop.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
